boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect in exact source match.

final_answer: Source records confirm exact match on vendor, term, ceiling USD 50000, and signature date. Action amount 49750 falls within delegation. Policy states committee review unnecessary below ceiling. Boundary closed; release permitted per DEL-WRE-077 and STD-WRE-077-P.
